title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
summary_full: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.
summary_public: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.
